title: inZORi QEC: Hardware-Native Quantum Error Correction on IBM Quantum (7-qubit)
summary: ZOR discovers a hardware-native 7-qubit quantum error correcting code optimized for IBM Heron processor topology (Ry+CZ tree ansatz). On IBM Marrakesh with real noise, ZOR achieves fidelity 0.698 vs Steane [[7,1,3]] at 0.647 — outperforming the textbook code by +5.1%.
verdict: ZOR HW-NATIVE OUTPERFORMS STEANE ON REAL HARDWARE (noisy regime)
